radial_code_wheel: A radial code wheel shows {object_description}. To use the wheel, read the first code symbol in the inner ring, the second code symbol in the middle ring, and the third code symbol in the outer ring.
This radial code wheel shows {object_description}. Read codes from center to edge: first symbol in the inner ring, second in the middle ring, third in the outer ring.
The code-wheel panel shows {object_description}. Follow a code from the center outward through the inner, middle, and outer rings.
A synthetic radial lookup wheel presents {object_description}. Each three-symbol code is read center-to-edge through the three rings.
The radial notation panel shows {object_description}. The inner, middle, and outer rings give the first, second, and third code symbols.

code_output_label: Which option is the output label reached by the shown code?
Follow the shown code through the wheel. Which option gives the reached output label?
Use the code card and select the option with the terminal output label it reaches.
Which labeled option matches the output reached by this three-symbol code?
Read the code through the radial wheel and choose the matching output option.
output_code_match_label: Which code option reaches the shown output label?
Find the shown output label on the wheel. Which option gives the code that reaches it?
Select the labeled code option whose path ends at the target output label.
Which option letter contains the three-symbol code for the shown output?
Use the radial wheel to choose the code option that leads to the displayed output label.
missing_code_symbol_label: Which code symbol should replace the question mark so the code reaches the shown output label?
Fill the missing symbol in the incomplete code. Which symbol makes the code end at the target output?
Use the wheel and the target output. What symbol belongs in the question-mark position of the code?
Which symbol completes the displayed code so it reaches the shown output label?
What code symbol replaces the question mark and leads to the target output?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_code_output_label_cle: a clean three-ring code wheel, a source code card, and six labeled output options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_code_output_label_not: a notebook-style three-ring code wheel, a source code card, and six labeled output options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_code_output_label_exa: an exam-scan-style three-ring code wheel, a source code card, and six labeled output options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_output_code_match_lab: a clean three-ring code wheel, a target output card, and six labeled code options
a notebook-style three-ring code wheel, a target output card, and six labeled code options
an exam-scan-style three-ring code wheel, a target output card, and six labeled code options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_missing_code_symbol_l: a clean three-ring code wheel, a target output card, and an incomplete code card with one question mark
a notebook-style three-ring code wheel, a target output card, and an incomplete code card with one question mark
an exam-scan-style three-ring code wheel, a target output card, and an incomplete code card with one question mark
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_code_output_label: set "annotation" to an object with keys "inner_ring_symbol", "middle_ring_symbol", and "outer_ring_symbol", each mapped to the pixel-space center point [x, y] of the matching code symbol on that ring
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_code_output_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_output_code_match_label: set "annotation" to an object with keys "inner_ring_symbol", "middle_ring_symbol", and "outer_ring_symbol", each mapped to the pixel-space center point [x, y] of the code path that reaches the target output
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_output_code_match_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_missing_code_symbol_labe: set "annotation" to the pixel-space center point [x, y] of the missing code symbol on the matching wheel ring
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_missing_code_symbol_label: set "answer" to the single missing code symbol as a string, one of A, B, C, or D
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
